release_notes: v1.2.0 Real provider SDK execution paths
Anthropic Messages API — full text generation with system prompts
Google Gemini API — generateContent with system instructions
OpenRouter — hardened with proper API key handling
Ollama — real /api/generate with system prompt support
Role runtime execution: resolve role → provider → fallback chain
Discussion Mode uses actual configured providers with partial fallback
CLI: chat --model-role, chat --discussion, text generate with all providers
Chat UI shows role badge, provider/model, fallback warnings
Provider errors are redacted — no secrets in logs or responses
